Late Blight.causes: Phytophthora infestans fungus, humid weather above 90%, cool temperatures 15-20°C
Late Blight.treatment: Mancozeb 75% WP @ 2g/L or Copper Oxychloride @ 3g/L or Metalaxyl + Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L. Spray every 7 days during wet weather.
Late Blight.prevention: Avoid overhead irrigation, ensure air circulation, use resistant varieties, remove infected debris, crop rotation

Early Blight.causes: Alternaria solani fungus, warm humid conditions 24-29°C
Early Blight.treatment: Chlorothalonil @ 2g/L or Mancozeb 75% WP @ 2.5g/L or Azoxystrobin @ 1ml/L. Apply every 10-14 days.
Early Blight.prevention: Crop rotation (3 years), remove infected debris, stake plants for air circulation, mulching

symptoms: plants wilt during day recover at night initially
milky bacterial ooze when stem is cut
Bacterial Wilt.causes: Ralstonia solanacearum bacteria, waterlogged soil, high temperatures
Bacterial Wilt.treatment: No effective chemical treatment. Remove and destroy infected plants. Apply Streptocycline 100ppm drench for prevention.
Bacterial Wilt.prevention: Use resistant varieties, crop rotation (5 years), avoid waterlogging, use disease-free seedlings

Powdery Mildew.causes: Fungal spores (Erysiphe, Podosphaera), dry conditions, moderate temperature 20-25°C
Powdery Mildew.treatment: Sulphur 80% WP @ 2g/L or Carbendazim @ 1g/L or Triadimefon @ 0.5g/L. Spray at first sign.
Powdery Mildew.prevention: Avoid overcrowding, ensure ventilation, avoid evening irrigation, resistant varieties

symptoms: yellow spots on upper leaf surface
Downy Mildew.causes: Oomycete pathogens (Peronospora, Pseudoperonospora), cool wet conditions
Downy Mildew.treatment: Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L or Metalaxyl + Mancozeb @ 2g/L or Copper Hydroxide @ 2g/L. Spray every 7-10 days.
Downy Mildew.prevention: Good drainage, avoid overhead irrigation, morning watering, crop rotation

Fusarium Wilt.causes: Fusarium oxysporum fungus, soil-borne, warm temperatures 25-30°C
Fusarium Wilt.treatment: Soil drenching with Carbendazim @ 2g/L or Trichoderma viride @ 5g/L. Seed treatment with Thiram @ 3g/kg.
Fusarium Wilt.prevention: Resistant varieties, crop rotation, soil solarization, biocontrol agents (Trichoderma)

Anthracnose.causes: Colletotrichum species fungi, high humidity, rainy season
Anthracnose.treatment: Carbendazim @ 1g/L or Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L or Copper Oxychloride @ 3g/L. Spray 3-4 times during flowering.
Anthracnose.prevention: Prune infected parts, remove mummies, avoid crowding, post-harvest hot water treatment

Yellow Mosaic Virus.treatment: No direct cure. Control vector with Imidacloprid @ 0.5ml/L or Thiamethoxam @ 0.3g/L. Remove infected plants.
Yellow Mosaic Virus.prevention: Use resistant varieties, control whiteflies, remove weeds, use reflective mulches, intercropping with maize

Leaf Curl Virus.treatment: Control whiteflies with Imidacloprid @ 0.5ml/L. Spray Neem oil 2% weekly as deterrent. Remove affected plants.
Leaf Curl Virus.prevention: Resistant varieties, destroy volunteer plants, control whiteflies, avoid planting near infected crops

Rust Disease.causes: Puccinia species fungi, cool humid conditions, dew formation
Rust Disease.treatment: Propiconazole @ 1ml/L or Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L or Triadimefon @ 1g/L. Apply at first sign.
Rust Disease.prevention: Resistant varieties, destroy volunteer crops, proper spacing, avoid late sowing

Blast Disease.causes: Magnaporthe oryzae fungus, high humidity, excess nitrogen
Blast Disease.treatment: Tricyclazole 75% WP @ 0.6g/L or Isoprothiolane @ 1.5ml/L. Spray at first symptom and repeat after 15 days.
Blast Disease.prevention: Resistant varieties, balanced fertilizer (avoid excess N), seed treatment, field sanitation

Root Rot.causes: Rhizoctonia, Fusarium, Macrophomina fungi, waterlogging, poor drainage
Root Rot.treatment: Seed treatment with Carbendazim + Thiram @ 2g/kg. Soil application of Trichoderma @ 5kg/acre.
Root Rot.prevention: Good drainage, avoid waterlogging, crop rotation, biocontrol agents, seed treatment

Damping Off.causes: Pythium, Rhizoctonia, Fusarium fungi, overwatering, poor drainage, overcrowding
Damping Off.treatment: Drench with Metalaxyl @ 2g/L or Copper Oxychloride @ 3g/L. Reduce watering.
Damping Off.prevention: Sterilize soil, avoid overwatering, thin seedlings, good drainage, Trichoderma application

symptoms: yellow to white streaks along veins
Bacterial Leaf Blight.causes: Xanthomonas oryzae bacteria, heavy rains, flooding, wounds
Bacterial Leaf Blight.treatment: Streptocycline @ 100ppm + Copper Oxychloride @ 3g/L. Spray 2-3 times at 10 day interval.
Bacterial Leaf Blight.prevention: Resistant varieties, avoid excess nitrogen, balanced K fertilization, seed treatment

Stem Borer Damage.causes: Various stem borer insects (Scirpophaga, Chilo species)
Stem Borer Damage.treatment: Carbofuran 3G @ 12kg/acre in whorl. Spray Chlorpyriphos @ 2.5ml/L or Cartap Hydrochloride @ 2g/L.
Stem Borer Damage.prevention: Light traps, pheromone traps, destroy stubbles, avoid ratoon crops, release Trichogramma

Nitrogen Deficiency.causes: Insufficient nitrogen in soil, leaching, waterlogging
Nitrogen Deficiency.treatment: Apply Urea @ 20-30 kg/acre or 2% Urea foliar spray. Split application recommended.
Nitrogen Deficiency.prevention: Soil testing, balanced fertilization, organic matter addition, nitrification inhibitors

Phosphorus Deficiency.causes: Low soil phosphorus, high pH fixing P, cold soils
Phosphorus Deficiency.treatment: Apply DAP @ 50 kg/acre or SSP @ 100 kg/acre basal. Foliar spray of 2% DAP.
Phosphorus Deficiency.prevention: Soil testing, adequate P at planting, mycorrhizal inoculation

Potassium Deficiency.causes: Low soil K, sandy soils, heavy K-demanding crops
Potassium Deficiency.treatment: Apply MOP (Muriate of Potash) @ 40 kg/acre or SOP @ 50 kg/acre. Foliar KCl 1%.
Potassium Deficiency.prevention: Soil testing, adequate K fertilization, avoid excess Na

Iron Deficiency.causes: High pH soil (>7.5), calcareous soils, excess phosphorus
Iron Deficiency.treatment: Foliar spray of Ferrous Sulphate @ 0.5% + Citric Acid 0.1% or Fe-EDTA @ 0.2%.
Iron Deficiency.prevention: Acidify root zone with sulfur, avoid overliming, Fe-fortified fertilizers

Zinc Deficiency.causes: High pH, sandy soils, high phosphorus, continuous flooded rice
Zinc Deficiency.treatment: Soil application of Zinc Sulphate @ 10 kg/acre or foliar spray @ 0.5%.
Zinc Deficiency.prevention: Regular Zn application, avoid excess P, soil testing, Zn-coated fertilizers
